name: Vaxart, Inc.
summary: Vaxart, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing oral recombinant vaccines using its proprietary VAAST platform. The company's tablet vaccines use a non-replicating Ad5 vector to deliver antigens and adjuvants to the small intestine, targeting mucosal and systemic immunity. Pipeline candidates address norovirus, COVID-19, influenza, and HPV-related cervical cancer. No products are currently approved or marketed.

products.name: Bivalent Norovirus Oral Tablet Vaccine Candidate
products.description: VP1-based oral tablet vaccine targeting norovirus GI.1 and GII.4 strains, delivered to small intestine to induce mucosal and systemic immune responses.

products.name: COVID-19 Oral Tablet Vaccine Candidate
products.description: Oral recombinant vaccine candidate targeting SARS-CoV-2 using the VAAST Ad5 vector platform.

products.name: Influenza Oral Tablet Vaccine Candidate
products.description: Oral tablet vaccine candidate targeting influenza using the VAAST Ad5 vector platform.

products.name: HPV Therapeutic Vaccine Candidate
products.description: Preclinical therapeutic vaccine candidate targeting cervical cancer and dysplasia caused by human papillomavirus.

products.name: VAAST Platform
products.description: Proprietary oral vaccine platform using non-replicating Ad5 vector with dsRNA adjuvant delivered via enteric-coated tablet to the small intestine.
